name: Hot Pickled Vegetables
recipeIngredient: 3 Celery Stalks, cut into 2 X 1/4-inch strips (about 1 1/2 cups)
1/2 cup Peppers (Serrano or Jalapeno Chiles), seeded and sliced
recipeInstructions:
1. Trim the green beans.
2. Cut celery into 2 X 1/4-inch strips (about 1 1/2 cups).
3. Slice carrots diagonally into thin pieces.
4. Remove broccoli flowerets from stems.
5. Peel and halve pearl onions.
6. Prepare peppers by removing stems, seeding, and slicing them.
7. Combine salt, vinegar, water, peppercorns, and ground cloves in a jar or container.
8. Add the prepared vegetables to the mixture, ensuring they are well-coated with the brine.
9. Seal the container tightly.
10. Allow the mixture to cool to room temperature before refrigerating.
